verifier_rubric: per-paper joint coverage of all K=4 candidate sub-mechanisms
rationale: Two disjoint halves: papers 1-3 cover eikonal/FMM (M_3, partial M_2); papers 4-7 cover per-token early-exit (M_1, M_4, partial M_2). No paper bridges them via fast-marching eikonal solve over token×layer grid for LLM routing. Pattern E preserved.
